title: neomammillaria centricirrha
intro: Neomammillaria centricirrha, also known as the "century plant," is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the cactus family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Neomammillaria centricirrha include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a powder or made into a tea, and it can also be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
